claims.summary: Regulator texture labels need traceable component inputs rather than free-standing prose.
claims.disposition: verify derive_texture_from_components and its exact mapping tests

claims.summary: Pressure divergence must remain visible when texture otherwise appears settled.
claims.disposition: verify pressure, comfort, density, and viscosity are separate fields and test cases

claims.summary: Dynamic damping should first exist as alignment evidence with explicit uncertainty.
claims.disposition: verify current damping review is observational and records live_write=false

claims.summary: Activating the damping candidate would change live regulator behavior.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 operator approval work with replay, canary, abort, rescue, and felt-review material
